settings.heading: Disclaimer
settings.subtext: These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) or MHRA (Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency). Our products are cosmetics—designed to beautify—not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Only medicines can legally make such claims.

settings.heading: Nifora
settings.subtext: At Nifora, we specialize in high-performance skincare powered by advanced Korean beauty technology. Our expertly formulated products are designed to nourish, hydrate, and restore confidence—helping you achieve luminous, healthy skin with every use.
